examples: I entered the kitchen, with its old tile floor and its cherrywood cabinets.
His skin was the color of dark cherrywood, his forehead big and shiny.
The Signature Service branch 18 floors above Park Avenue inNew York soothes its clientele with classical music, cherrywood paneling, fresh flowers and wonderful views of Manhattan.
Avoiding my reflections as well as I could, for these mirrors showed only a tired man with a look of sorrow in his eyes, I chose a rectangular mirror with a cherrywood frame.
